---
title: "The Union of the Two Noble and Illustre Famelies of Lancastre [and] Yorke"
---

## The Union of the Two Noble and Illustre Famelies of Lancastre [and] Yorke

**Author:** Edward Hall
**Date:** 1548
**Imprint:** London: Grafton

### Notes

Known as Hall\'s Chronicle.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
